name: Quest Labs
description: Quest Labs — User engagement and growth SDK using AI to personalize onboarding and in-app messaging.

seo.title: Quest Labs — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Quest Labs: Quest Labs — User engagement and growth SDK using AI to personalize onboarding and in-app messaging.

when_to_use: Building in-app user onboarding flows powered by AI personalization
Delivering contextual product tours based on user behavior signals
A/B testing AI-personalized feature discovery experiments
Reducing time-to-value for new users with AI-guided onboarding

pros: SDK speeds up onboarding flow delivery
Drop-in UI components cut design time
cons: Adds runtime SDK weight to your app
review.verdict: Reasonable shortcut to AI-flavored onboarding, but established Appcues-class tools may be safer long term.
review.best_for: Product teams shipping onboarding flows without engineering time
review.not_for: Teams already running Pendo or Appcues in production

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
